payload.answer: Compiled the source text into five atomic, traceable memory cards.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes general system-design principles rather than a specific user or existing entity requiring resolution.

memory_cards.statement: AI memory systems need durable source evidence.
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable.
A semantic index can improve recall in an AI memory system.
The application database must own lifecycle state in an AI memory system.
The application database must own conflict state in an AI memory system.

details: Committed general design principles as atomic memory cards.
Preserved modality for 'can improve recall' rather than overstating it.
Split lifecycle ownership and conflict-state ownership into separate atomic cards.
